---
title: "Mary Ann Moberly"
---

## Mary Ann Moberly

**Dates:** (29 Sept 1812-6 Feb 1890)

**Maiden name:** (Crokat)

### Description

wife of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

She married (22 Dec 1834) the Rt. Rev. George Moberly.

### Letters

- Letter from [February 1890]
- Letter from Sept 18th [1889]
- Letter from [late June or early July] 1884. 
- Letter from [1884] [[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from Jan. 1, 1872.
- Letter from December 30 [1871]
- Letter from Innocents\' Day [28 December 1871]
- Letter from Nov. 1871.
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from August 12. [1869]
- Letter from [November 1868]
- Letter from [early] Oct. 1868.
- Letter from Sept. 30, 1868
- Letter from May 1866
- Letter from Easter Eve [31 March], 1866.
- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]
- Letter from Ascension Day [14 May 1863]
- Letter from Dec. 1860

*... and 12 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
